channel.title: flove making-of — Skills questions
channel.description: New Skills design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What do you want to do with the writing-skills workflow?
item.description:
• Create a new skill — Author a brand-new skill from scratch, starting with a baseline (RED) test. • Edit an existing skill — Modify or improve a skill you already have. • Test / verify a skill — Run pressure scenarios against an existing skill.
★ decided: Create a new skill

item.title: What's the skill about?
item.description:
• A flove/frontend pattern — A reusable design/code technique from the flove work. • A workflow/process rule — A discipline future agents should follow. • Something else — A different technique or reference.
★ decided: A workflow/process rule

item.title: When should the form replace asking inline?
item.description:
• Many questions (~4+) — Use the form whenever there are roughly 4+ questions; ask 1–3 inline. • Always in brainstorm/plan — Always render the form when there are questions. • Only when I offer it — I propose the form and you opt in each time.
★ decided: Only when I offer it · ◇ recommended: Many questions (~4+)

item.title: Where is the generated form saved?
item.description:
• Alongside the work — Into the relevant project's docs/, then I hand over the path. • A fixed scratch folder — Always one place regardless of project. • Current working directory — Wherever we're working, dated filename.
★ decided: Alongside the work · ◇ recommended: Alongside the work
